name: finuslugi-3d-visual-pipeline
description: Controlled reference-to-image production pipeline for Finuslugi 3D visual assets.

interface.longDescription: Analyze a visual brief and references, compile a versioned style specification, generate or edit an image, diagnose deviations, and deliver a validated Finuslugi 3D asset.
defaultPrompt: Use the Finuslugi 3D visual pipeline to turn my reference into a new style-consistent image.
